title: This 4K OLED Gaming Monitor Is $400 Off Right Now
summary: If you want a premium flat-screen monitor with impressive color range and accuracy, and the true blacks of an OLED, the 32-inch Asus ROG Swift PG32UCDMR is a smart pick, especially considering its extensive burn-in protection (along with a three-year warranty).
